query: Change the ControlNet strength to 0.8 so the pose guidance is more subtle.

desired.outcome: The generated image follows the input pose/edges less strictly, allowing the sampler more creative freedom while still retaining the pose outline.
desired.quality: The ControlNet strength parameter is updated, all node connections remain intact, and the workflow still outputs two preview images.

_tags.author_rationale: This precise, testable parameter edit targets the core ControlNet mechanism and avoids generic improvement phrasing.
